next_step_text: 30% confidence Jun 9th RFP has come out today- ck to reach out to project lead- and May 04: Confirmation project is frozen due to other internal priorities. KIV and get update by July Apr27 No update on date of Tender. Chasing after sourcing project manager. Apr13 RFP to be received by April 20. Pending session on Risk management with procurement Mar 27 just re confirm Tender will come early April

buyer_dependent_items.text: Confirm the tender evaluation timeline and shortlist / decision date for Q114354.

competitive_position.summary: Icertis is the single strongest current threat, favoured by MTR's advisor EY who 'seems to push for Icertis' (05 Nov 2025); Zycus is countering via partner Alliance but the outcome is unproven. Sirion Labs is named in the tender field with no active buyer signal (low threat). The award is being decided through the formal Q114354 public tender, so no competitor is buyer-confirmed as preferred; EY's influence is the risk to watch. Zycus's wedge is the Merlin GenAI story against MTR's stated AI mandate.

competitors.name: Icertis
competitors.quote: EY (supporting process) seems to push for Icertis (working with Alliance to mitigate). Risk of delay to Q4.
competitors.how_we_win: Position Merlin GenAI contract intelligence versus Icertis rules-based CLM and quantify AI/automation ROI in the tender response.

competitors.name: Sirion Labs
competitors.how_we_win: Differentiate on integrated source-to-contract plus Merlin AI; no active buyer preference signal to counter yet.

champion_strength.source: SF Next_Step__c 08 Dec 2025; Contact Role Navjot Singh; Task 05 Mar 2026
champion_strength.summary: No champion. Navjot Singh (Procurement Transformation Head) is the strongest candidate because his mandate aligns with the Merlin AI story, but there is no advocacy, introduction, or push-back on EY's Icertis lean. Lilian Au-Yeung is a helpful gatekeeper, not an influencer. Exec-sponsor engagement failed (08 Dec 2025).

sources: Contact Role: Alex Gautier, Decision Maker
Task 14 Jun 2026 Horizon invite to Alex
No Economic Buyer contact role present
meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: No economic buyer is engaged. Alex Gautier (General Manager - Procurement & Supply Chain) is the Salesforce Decision Maker and the most senior mapped contact, but there is no record of him joining a call or commercial conversation; outreach to him was limited to Horizon-event invitations (25 Mar and 14 Jun 2026 emails). No budget owner or CFO-level sponsor is named in the contact roles, and the AIS note flags 'not able to identify champion / exec sponsor engagement' (08 Dec 2025). In a public tender the formal budget sits above procurement, so identifying and reaching the budget owner behind Q114354 is a ranked move. What the evidence does show is that procurement (Alex Gautier, Navjot Singh, Lilian Au-Yeung) owns the process today, not that a commercial sponsor has been secured.

recommended_moves: Submit the completed Q114354 CLMS tender response through the hkextender portal before deadline.
Ask Lilian Au-Yeung to confirm the evaluation timeline and shortlist decision date in writing.
Convert Navjot Singh into a Merlin GenAI champion via a transformation-focused working session.
